title: Raw station files
description: Immutable HTML-XLS/XLSX workbooks under raw_data for Pucón and La Poza.

title: Source manifest
description: SHA-256 hashes, parsed sheet, row counts, station assignment, and date coverage.

title: Date provenance repair
description: Pucón mixed Excel serials repaired to Spanish DMY; raw_date_value retained per row.

title: Canonical long table
description: Station, date, variable, statistic, value, unit, source file, and source row.

title: Validity checks
description: Sentinel -99, negative values, implausible ranges, and explicit unit normalization.

title: Model eligibility flags
description: Unresolved dates, hash collisions, and invalid rows are excluded from model inputs.

stage_label: Daily Chl-a target and QA gate
title: Daily Chl-a aggregation
description: Station-day mean Chl-a with observed mask, source_count, source rows, and source files.

stage_label: Daily Chl-a target and QA gate
title: Data-QA gate
description: Forecasts are allowed only after all P0 blockers are cleared or explicitly accepted.

stage_label: Daily Chl-a target and QA gate
title: Blocking evidence
description: Duplicate station values, spike review, station hash collisions, and imputation dominance.

title: Observed values preserved
description: Direct 2024 measurements are never smoothed, capped, or overwritten.

title: Short gaps
description: Bracketed PCHIP only when both neighboring observations exist and the gap is ≤10 days.

title: Long gaps
description: Prior-year circular DOY climatology, harmonic Huber fit, and deterministic analog residuals.

title: Controls
description: 21-day boundary blend, imputed-only cap, no Savitzky-Golay in the final target.

title: Evidence tables
description: Preprocessing footprint, mixed-date audit, source manifests, diagnostics, and validation tables.

title: Validation figure
description: Observed versus imputed 2024 series with uncertainty proxy and imputation-method flags.

title: Model input contract
description: Context windows, horizons, quantiles, and cache schema are used only after QA acceptance.
